title: Request: Join together groups for Sorting
excerpt:
If I sort items by priority it only sorts within each group ( not helpful when you have many groups) and want to easily surface up high priority items. 
Can you allow us to view cards all together in a board when sorting…

posts.author: jrybar (Jorge R)
posts.cookedHtml:
If I sort items by priority it only sorts within each group ( not helpful when you have many groups) and want to easily surface up high priority items.
Can you allow us to view cards all together in a board when sorting? cards could still be marked with the group color but not separated into groups… this could be an option you turn on when sorting.
